head: Slaying
notes: Cleanest recursive chain. All three intermediate operators decompose to locked + locked. Singleton observation.

head: Riffing
notes: Cascades into open math conflicts. Cannot promote.

head: Phasing
notes: Two-link chain but head depends on Q4 batch.

head: Smiling
notes: Swirling is operator-inventory'd but its full semantics are still pending.

head: Slicing
intermediate_links: Gyro Rev. Swirling OR Blurry Quasi
notes: Not a chain; two competing chains. IFPA cannot adopt until FM resolves which is canonical.

head: Atomsmasher
notes: Already an IFPA alias. PassBack reading reinforces the decomposition. No new chain to promote.

head: Barfly
notes: Already an IFPA canonical row. PassBack reading aligns with canonical.

head: Blender
notes: Reference equivalence; not a promotion candidate. pt11 settled.

head: Bling Blang
notes: Observed FM-side equivalence. Reverse ADD weight not formally adjudicated; +0 by pattern.

head: Sailing
notes: Same as NF-2A queue head. Two-locked-modifier composition; clean recursion termination.

head: Flailing
notes: Decomposes to two locked operators. If accepted, Flailing is alias for Symp + Atomic, not a new modifier.

head: Gyro
notes: Same shape as EC12. If Gyro = Spinning ss is accepted, no new operator class needed.

head: Leaning
notes: Once Inspinning is accepted, Leaning reads cleanly as Stepping + Front-Spin.

head: Hyper
notes: pt8 ruling makes rooted=0; remainder is locked.

head: Pogo
notes: Uptime ADD-weight by analogy. ATW is canonical.
